myCalendarPreviewHint: Events you saved — lists, invites, or yours.
myCalendarWeekPreviewHint: 7 days from today; the number is how many events. Tap to open the calendar.
myCalendarProfileCardHint: Tap a day; today is selected by default.
myCalendarScreenHint: Tap days to filter (tap again to clear). No selection shows the full month; changing month resets.
myCalendarEmpty: Nothing in this filter. Save events to lists.
myCalendarEmptyMonth: Nothing this month with this filter.
myCalendarClearSelectionA11y: Clear days and show the whole month
legalExternalLinkA11y: Content or action with external link
legalHelpBody: To reach us, open your mail app with the support address configured for the app.
legalHelpOpenExternalA11y: Open mail app with external link
legalDocumentVersionLabel: Version of this text in the app: {{version}}
profileCompletenessHint: Add city, bio, and interests for better recommendations.
profileAvatarSheetSubtitle: Take a new photo or choose one from your library. The image is cropped to a square.
profileAvatarRemovePhoto: Remove photo and use generated avatar
profileAvatarPermissionLibrary: eClose needs access to your photos to pick an image. You can enable this in Settings.
profileAvatarPermissionCamera: eClose needs the camera to take your photo. You can enable this in Settings.
profileFieldBioPlaceholder: One or two lines about you…
profileEditAvatarHint: Change your profile photo by tapping your picture above.
profileSavedVenuesHint: Recent pins — sync will follow your account.
profileAchievementsHint: Light milestones — no competition; just useful habits.
badgeCityDesc: You shared where you usually go out.
badgeBioDesc: You added a bit about yourself.
badgeCalendarDesc: You have events saved in your calendar.
